subcodes.first_line: We have indeed gazed toward the precincts of the Prison in Ṭá, and behold Our loved ones who have been imprisoned without proof or testimony [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد کنا ننظر الی شطر السجن فی الطاء و نری اولیاء الذین سجنوا من دون بینه و لا
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
